headline: Invitation Homes Inc. (NYSE:INVH) Q1 2026 Results Beat on Core FFO, Stock Surges 10.7%
summary: Invitation Homes (INVH) beat Q1 2026 estimates with Core FFO of $0.48, while revenue rose 9% to $734M. Despite lower occupancy and rent growth, a massive $500M buyback and maintained guidance drove shares up 10.7% after hours.
